name: construction contractors processing 5–15 permit applications/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 permit applications/month, inefficient permit application submissions cause project delays. We convert project documents into standardized submissions instead of manual submission of permit applications.
problem_solved: Inefficient permit application submissions lead to project delays.
